inputs.titre: Rétrospective de Damien Hirst au Tate Modern

reason: The image depicts a modern art exhibition, specifically resembling Damien Hirst's style. The preserved marine life in formaldehyde and butterfly displays are characteristic of his work. The clothing styles and overall ambiance are consistent with a modern art museum. The lighting fixtures are modern. The walls have modern treatment. The use of large glass vitrines for art display is a modern practice. The presence of a large number of people dressed in modern clothes is consistent with the intended setting. Absence of any fantastical elements.
